title: Admin
content_html:
Admin

Local Admin is a sibling local app, separate from Local Studio, Local Analytics, Docs Viewer, and public preview/build.

It is the home for cross-repo operational review, risk and audit work, test-run review, and Admin-hosted UI Catalogue routes.

  • Use Local Runners for app startup behavior and environment variables.
  • Use Testing and Run Checks for check profile ownership and run-log behavior.
  • Use Admin Checks for the /admin/checks/ report system, checks config, target-map audit, and report artifact contracts.
